'''鈭歫-j-k-s''' ('''kajajkesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoiden|hoiden]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-j-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoiden|hoiden]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-j-k-s
|-
! Lemma
| kajajkesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijajkesoko|thijajkesoko]] || [[word:jijajkesoko|jijajkesoko]] || [[word:shijajkesoko|shijajkesoko]] || [[word:kijajkesoko|kijajkesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujajkesoko|thuthujajkesoko]] || [[word:jujujajkesoko|jujujajkesoko]] || [[word:shushujajkesoko|shushujajkesoko]] || [[word:kukujajkesoko|kukujajkesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojajkesoko|thojajkesoko]] || [[word:jojajkesoko|jojajkesoko]] || [[word:shojajkesoko|shojajkesoko]] || [[word:kojajkesoko|kojajkesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jajkesoko|th忙jajkesoko]] || [[word:j忙jajkesoko|j忙jajkesoko]] || [[word:sh忙jajkesoko|sh忙jajkesoko]] || [[word:k忙jajkesoko|k忙jajkesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajajkesoko|thajajkesoko]] || [[word:jajajkesoko|jajajkesoko]] || [[word:shajajkesoko|shajajkesoko]] || [[word:kajajkesoko|kajajkesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
